prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated Ford Kent 1600 GT (engine code: 105E) with a bespoke dry-sump lubrication system by RPI Engineering, utilizing a custom billet aluminum oil pan and a high-flow external oil pump for sustained high-RPM operation (redline extended to 8,500 RPM).

Installation of a custom-built ITB (Individual Throttle Body) system by Jenvey Dynamics, featuring 42mm throttle bodies with CNC-machined velocity stacks and a custom intake manifold designed via CFD analysis for optimized airflow, paired with a custom fuel rail and Bosch Motorsport 1000cc injectors.

Chassis reinforcement via a full T45 steel roll cage by Custom Cages UK, integrated with a bespoke front strut tower brace and rear triangulated subframe connectors, combined with a fully adjustable Öhlins DFV road/track suspension kit (coilovers with 24-position rebound and 12-position compression damping) and spherical bearing conversion for all suspension pick-up points.
estetica: Full carbon fiber bodywork replacement using a bespoke kit by Carbon Italia, including a one-piece front splitter, side skirts, and a ducktail rear spoiler, all finished in matte clear coat with exposed weave for weight reduction (estimated 40% lighter than original fiberglass).

Custom 15-inch magnesium wheels by Campagnolo (model: Campagnolo Electron) in a 7.5J front and 9J rear staggered fitment, wrapped in Pirelli P7 Corsa tires (185/60R15 front, 225/50R15 rear) with custom center-lock adapters by Dymag.

Interior overhaul featuring a full Alcantara retrim by Trimworks UK, including a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub, bespoke Recaro SRD bucket seats with 6-point harnesses by Schroth, and a custom aluminum dashboard with Smiths gauges (3.5-inch tachometer, oil pressure, and water temperature) in a vintage racing aesthetic.
